description.zh: HiClaw 是一个开源的协作式多智能体操作系统，通过自托管的 Matrix 聊天室实现透明、以人为本的任务协同。它采用“管理者-工作者”（Manager-Workers）架构，协调多种 AI 智能体（如 OpenClaw、CoPaw）完成复杂任务，所有对话、凭证和数据均保留在用户自有基础设施内。它本质上是一个企业级、高安全性的“聊天室中的 AI 团队”。
description.en: HiClaw is an open-source, collaborative multi-agent operating system that enables transparent, human-in-the-loop task coordination via self-hosted Matrix chat rooms. It uses a Manager-Workers architecture to orchestrate AI agents (e.g., OpenClaw, CoPaw) for complex tasks—while keeping all communication, credentials, and data fully private and on-premises. It serves as an enterprise-grade, secure “AI team in a chat room”.

feature.zh:
## 产品优势:

- 企业级安全防护：真实 API 密钥与令牌永不触达工作者智能体，杜绝凭证泄露风险。
- 完全私有化与去中心化通信：基于自托管 Matrix（Tuwunel），无厂商锁定，无数据外泄。
- 原生支持“人在环路中”：所有智能体交互均实时可见、可介入，消除黑盒操作。
- 零配置、一键部署（`curl | bash`）：自动集成 AI 网关、IM 服务、文件存储、Web 界面与管理者智能体。
- 轻量级、可扩展的工作者运行时（CoPaw / NanoClaw / ZeroClaw），支持高密度智能体部署。

## 功能列表:

- 可定制的智能体运行时（“Claws”）：支持 OpenClaw、CoPaw、NanoClaw、ZeroClaw 或企业自定义智能体。
- 自然语言驱动的管理者智能体：支持通过对话创建、分派、监控工作者生命周期。
- 自托管 Matrix 服务器（Tuwunel）+ Element Web 客户端：提供安全、私有、实时的智能体-人类协作聊天环境。
- 基于 MinIO 的共享文件系统：支撑工作者智能体无状态化、可随时销毁重建。
- Higress AI 网关作为安全凭证代理：工作者仅持有消费令牌，不接触任何真实 API 密钥。
- 按需加载 skills.sh 技能库（80,000+ 社区技能），权限由令牌沙箱严格隔离。
- 内置 MCP（Model Context Protocol）服务器支持，真实凭证零暴露。
feature.en:
## Benefits:

- Enterprise-grade security with zero credential exposure: real API keys and tokens never reach workers.
- Fully private and decentralized communication via self-hosted Matrix (Tuwunel), eliminating vendor lock-in and data leakage.
- Built-in human-in-the-loop transparency: every agent interaction is visible and intervenable in real time.
- Zero-configuration, one-command deployment (`curl | bash`) covering gateway, IM, storage, UI, and manager.
- Lightweight, scalable worker runtimes (CoPaw, NanoClaw, ZeroClaw) enabling high-density agent deployment.

## Features:

- Customizable agent runtimes ("Claws"): OpenClaw, CoPaw, NanoClaw, ZeroClaw, or custom enterprise agents.
- Natural-language-driven Manager Agent for worker lifecycle management (create, assign, monitor).
- Self-hosted Matrix server (Tuwunel) + Element Web client for secure, private, real-time agent-human chat.
- Shared MinIO-based file system enabling stateless, reproducible worker instances.
- Higress AI Gateway acting as a secure credential proxy: workers receive only consumer tokens—not real API keys.
- On-demand skills loading from skills.sh (80,000+ community skills), sandboxed by token-based access.
- Integrated MCP (Model Context Protocol) server support with zero-credential exposure.
